title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF ILAURES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUGASONG, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5964 / 53 OG No. 16, 5154 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1743, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF ILAURES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUGASONG, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Ilaures is separated from the barrio of Camangahan, Municipality of Bugasong, Province of Antique, and constituted into a barrio in the said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Ilaures.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
